features.name: Create test_claude_launcher.py: test_domain_agents_defined — assert all 8 DOMAIN_AGENTS keys present with description, prompt, tools, model fields
test_launch_sdk_session_mock — mock claude_agent_sdk.query(), verify ClaudeAgentOptions built with correct model/max_turns/permission_mode, verify ok=True returned
test_semaphore_limits — verify _get_semaphore returns limit=1 for content-agent (COST_LIMIT_DOMAINS) and MAX_CONCURRENT for others
test_failure_hook_updates_swarm_state — mock get_swarm(), call _sdk_failure_hook('builder-agent', 'timeout', 'task-1'), assert swarm coding agent state.last_error set
test_write_sdk_checkpoint — call write_sdk_checkpoint('t1','intake',{result:'ok'}), assert ~/openclaw-shared/handoffs.jsonl has entry, context.json has key 'sdk_pipeline_t1'
Create test_sdk_pipeline.py: test_resume_empty_dir — resume_pipeline on fresh tempdir returns stage='intake' (no checkpoint)
test_resume_after_intake_checkpoint — write intake checkpoint to tempdir, assert resume_pipeline returns stage='research'
test_run_pipeline_mock — mock launch_sdk_session to return ok=True for all calls, run_client_pipeline('test proposal', tempdir) completes all 5 stages
test_run_pipeline_stage_failure — mock launch_sdk_session to fail on 'research', assert PipelineError raised with stage='research' and checkpoint at 'intake' preserved
Create test_sdk_executor.py: test_executor_task_type — SdkAgentExecutor().task_type == 'sdk_agent'
test_executor_check_available_true — set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + mock shutil.which('claude') returns path, assert check_available() returns True
test_executor_check_available_false — clear ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, assert check_available() returns False
test_executor_validate_output_ok — validate_output({'ok': True, 'result': 'done'}) returns []
test_executor_validate_output_failure — validate_output({'ok': False, 'error': 'timeout'}) returns list with 1 error string containing 'timeout'
Create test_sdk_swarm.py: test_sdk_engine_registered — import AGENT2_ENGINES from agent_swarm, assert 'claude_sdk' key present
test_sdk_engine_role_map — mock launch_sdk_session, call _sdk_engine with packet tool_name='coding', assert agent_type='builder-agent' passed
test_coding_agent_profile_engine — find coding AgentProfile in AGENT_PROFILES, assert engine == 'claude_sdk'
test_sdk_engine_returns_execution_result — mock ok=True result, assert _sdk_engine returns ExecutionResult with status='completed'
test_sdk_engine_failure_returns_failed_result — mock ok=False, assert _sdk_engine returns ExecutionResult with status='failed' and warnings non-empty

Integration smoke test: test_config_sdk_vars — import config, assert all 6 SDK vars present (CLAUDE_CODE_MODEL, MAX_CONCURRENT, SESSION_TIMEOUT, MAX_BUDGET_USD, CLAUDE_CODE_AVAILABLE, CLIENT_PROJECTS_DIR)
